summary: Classified hydrated cluster items without GitHub mutation. #69242 remains the live canonical Linux SIGKILL/broad-search issue. #72240 is related but not a duplicate because it carries a distinct macOS diagnostics scope. Linked open PRs #87681 and #89104 remain useful context/fix paths, but this job blocks merge, fix, and raise_pr actions, so no close, merge, or fix artifact is planned.
